label: Renewable Energy Consumption from Other Sources

sections.about: This metric captures renewable energy consumed through sources other than electricity and fuel under BRSR Principle 6, Essential Indicator 1. It is usually a residual category and is often zero where renewable energy is fully classified as electricity or fuel. A higher value indicates better performance.
sections.performanceAndDrivers: All four companies reported zero across all three years, meaning renewable energy is fully classified under electricity or fuel categories rather than other-source categories. This category is not a strategic differentiator for any company.
sections.tataPositioning: In FY2025, Tata ranks 1st, tied with all peers at zero across all three years. There is no performance gap as all companies report the same value.
sections.targets: Broader renewable energy targets exist for Tata, SAIL and Jindal, but none are stated specifically for this sub-category of energy sources.
sections.comparabilityNotes: This category is residual. A zero value is not necessarily poor performance if renewable energy is reported under electricity or fuel.
